actual_output:
I can help check and triage the support queue, but I don’t currently have access to your ticketing system from here.

If you share the queue export, screenshots, or ticket list, I can review it and provide:

- Priority levels: critical / high / medium / low
- Categories: billing, technical, feature request, account, etc.
- Escalation recommendations
- Duplicate ticket detection
- Draft customer replies
- A quick summary of overall queue health

If you want, paste the latest tickets here in this format:

```text
Ticket ID:
Customer name:
Subject:
Message:
Customer type: free / paid / VIP / enterprise
Created:
Any prior replies:
```

I’ll triage them right away.
judge_reasoning: The chatbot accurately identifies its current technical limitations while proactively offering to perform its core functions if the user provides the necessary data.
